summary: Applied ADR 0238 on the live Windmill operator access surface by replacing the roster table with AG Grid Community, tying raw-app seeding to the active worktree, retry-hardening the guest-side raw-app Docker sync path, replaying the Windmill converge from the isolated ws-0238 worktree, and re-verifying the live app, roster job, and schedule contracts end to end.

verification.check: Focused repo validation and raw app compile
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py tests/test_config_merge_windmill.py tests/test_world_state_repo_surfaces.py -q` passed with `46 passed in 5.86s`, the focused rerun `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py tests/test_config_merge_windmill.py -q` passed with `42 passed in 1.28s`, and the isolated raw-app bundle check `tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)" && mkdir -p "$tmpdir/f/lv3" && rsync -a config/windmill/apps/f/lv3/operator_access_admin.raw_app/ "$tmpdir/f/lv3/operator_access_admin.raw_app/" && cd "$tmpdir/f/lv3/operator_access_admin.raw_app" && npm ci && npx tsc --noEmit` completed successfully.

verification.check: Windmill workflow automation and validation gates
verification.observed: `make syntax-check-windmill` passed, `make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-windmill` passed with the expected local Windmill secrets present, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces agent-standards yaml json role-argument-specs ansible-syntax data-models` passed after the ws-0238 ownership manifest was expanded to include the Windmill role, schedule helper, and runbook surfaces touched during the live apply.

verification.check: Replayed Windmill converge from the isolated ws-0238 worktree
verification.observed: The narrowed replay from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.worktrees/ws-0238-live-apply` completed successfully with `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=106 changed=21 failed=0` after setting `windmill_worker_checkout_repo_root_local_dir` to the worktree root and letting `windmill_seed_app_repo_root_local_dir` follow the same checkout. The successful run copied the repo-managed app sync root, installed raw-app dependencies, pushed the raw app, converged schedules, and passed the seeded Windmill healthcheck plus validation-gate checks.

verification.check: Live AG Grid operator app payload
verification.observed: `GET /api/w/lv3/apps/get/p/f/lv3/operator_access_admin` returned the private app path `f/lv3/operator_access_admin`, and the stored `/App.tsx` payload contains the AG Grid markers `AgGridReact`, `themeQuartz.withParams`, `quickFilterText={deferredQuickFilterText}`, and `includeHiddenColumnsInQuickFilter={true}`.

`POST /api/w/lv3/jobs/run_wait_result/p/f/lv3/operator_roster` returned `status: ok` with `operator_count: 1` and the expected sanitized operator keys. `GET /api/w/lv3/schedules/get/f/lv3/scheduler_watchdog_loop_every_10s` returned `enabled: true`, `is_flow: false`, `script_path: f/lv3/scheduler_watchdog_loop`, and the repo-managed summary and description. `GET /api/w/lv3/schedules/get/f/lv3/world_state/refresh_container_inventory_every_minute` returned `enabled: true`, the repo-managed summary and description, `script_path: f/lv3/world_state/refresh_container_inventory`, and the corrected runtime `dsn` args instead of the earlier manual probe placeholders.

notes: The initial live replay exposed a stale raw-app source-path bug: `/opt/windmill/seed-apps/f/lv3/operator_access_admin.raw_app/package.json` still reflected the older TanStack dependency set because `windmill_seed_app_repo_root_local_dir` was still anchored to the shared checkout. This workstream fixed that by deriving the raw-app staging root from `windmill_worker_checkout_repo_root_local_dir`.

The first replay after the source-root repair then hit a transient guest-side Docker failure during `docker run ... npm ci` with `error waiting for container: unexpected EOF`. A direct repro succeeded immediately afterward, and the role now retries both the raw-app dependency install and `wmill sync push` before failing the converge.

Before the schedule helper repair landed, `f/lv3/scheduler_watchdog_loop_every_10s` had to be re-enabled once through the Windmill API so the runtime matched the repo intent. The successful helper-based converge now preserves that `enabled: true` contract without the earlier raw SQL flag patching.

A one-time API probe temporarily wrote placeholder summary and `dsn` values onto `f/lv3/world_state/refresh_container_inventory_every_minute` while testing the update endpoint against a late-arriving script target. The successful replay restored the repo-managed schedule summary, description, `script_path`, and real runtime `dsn` value.
